native: AEOSBench task release_time/due_time/duration/coordinate/sensor_type
Basilisk visibility tensor
Basilisk geometric line-of-sight attitude summary when compact summaries are used
AEOSBench constellation battery/sensor/reaction-wheel fields when resource_mode=native
derived: priority/value sampled for the dynamic rescheduling objective
regular/emergency split sampled from the online task stream
optional spatial clustering of selected ground targets
optional observation-duration scaling before visibility-window filtering
original plan generated by deterministic greedy replay
memory/data-size derived from duration_x_data_rate when resource_mode=native

records.attitude_source: Basilisk ECI line-of-sight local-frame projection averaged over the longest visible run
